name: llm-sequential-tool-calls-guarantee
description: Every provider is constructed with allow_parallel_tool_calls=False. This flag — not async-vs-sync tool execution — is the actual guarantee that the manager's sequential-delegation design holds: if a model requested two handoffs in one turn, BeeAI's run_tools() would execute them concurrently via asyncio.gather (e.g. Docker Log Capturer starting before the Flow Runner produced anything to capture).
invariants: _SEQUENTIAL_TOOL_CALLS must be passed to every provider constructed in get_chat_model(), including new ones, even providers structurally incapable of >1 tool call per turn (belt-and-suspenders)
ClaudeCLIChatModel.clone() returning self is only safe because delegations are sequential — concurrent same-role delegations would race on _sent_message_count/_session_started
